name: ddaro
description: Worktree-based parallel workflow for Claude Code sessions. 6-tier classification (main / owned / adopted / protected / unmanaged / external), /ddaro:adopt to bring existing worktrees under management, cwd-safe destructive commands (clear/abandon run from main only), merge hand-off, and main_protection hooks (default strict — prompted during first-time setup). /ddaro:start now runs a 6-step setup with explicit 'is cwd main?' confirmation. /ddaro:abandon accepts adopted targets via --force. Commands collapsed: setting→config (menu on no-args), summary→resume --recap-only. Korean triggers: /ddaro, 따로, 병렬로. English: /ddaro, parallel, isolated.
